sources.notes: FDSN Event web service for the Euro-Med region. Filtered to France bounding box. Returns GeoJSON FeatureCollection of earthquake events with magnitude, depth, location, timestamp. Also supports XML/QuakeML format. ReNaSS is the French national seismic network contributing data.

Free API aggregating Météo-France AROME (high-res, 1.3km) and ARPEGE (global) models. Supports current conditions, hourly/daily forecasts up to 4 days. No API key required. Good for forecast data but not official weather warnings (use Meteoalarm for alerts).

Meteoalarm is the official European weather warning dissemination system. The HTML page for France shows current Météo-France vigilance levels. Backend API at meteoalarm.org/api/v1. CAP Atom feeds at feeds.meteoalarm.org. Covers all hazard types: wind, rain, thunderstorms, snow/ice, extreme temperatures, fog, avalanches, coastal events.

sources.authority: Service Central d'Hydrométéorologie et d'Appui à la Prévision des Inondations (SCHAPI)
sources.notes: Vigicrues flood monitoring API v1.1. Returns all flood warning territories in France (20 river basins) with codes and links for detailed status. Additional endpoints: StatEntVigiCru.json (station status), InfoVigiCru (GeoJSON), observations.json (real-time water levels), prevision.json (flood forecasts). Public API, no key required.

Real-time water level and discharge observations from ~1700 Vigicrues measurement stations. Add ?GrdSimul=Q for discharge, ?GrdSimul=H for water height. Filter by station with CdStationHydro parameter. Data updated every 5-60 minutes. Historical depth 1 month.

Flood predictions/previsions for Vigicrues monitoring stations. Returns list of stations with active forecasts including water level simulations. Use GrdSimul=Q for discharge. Filter by station with CdEntVigiCru and TypEntVigiCru (type 7 = station detail). Dates in ISO format.

Hub'Eau v2 API for real-time hydrometry (water levels H and discharge Q). ~5000 stations across France. Supports JSON, GeoJSON, CSV and XML Sandre formats. Additional endpoints: /referentiel/stations, /referentiel/sites, /obs_elab (daily/monthly means). API key no longer required since v2. CORS enabled.

RTE éCO2mix national real-time electricity data via OpenDataSoft (ODRE). Returns consumption, generation by source (nuclear, wind, solar, hydro, gas, coal, fuel, bioenergy), CO2 emissions, cross-border flows. 15-minute granularity. Also has regional/metro datasets. Consolidated data available in eco2mix-national-def dataset.

sources.authority: NASA FIRMS (Fire Information for Resource Management System)
sources.notes: NASA FIRMS active fire/hotspot detections. Free MAP_KEY registration required (5000 req/10min limit). Sensors: MODIS (1km), VIIRS S-NPP/NOAA-20/NOAA-21 (375m), LANDSAT (30m). Data within 3 hours globally. Returns CSV with lat/lon, brightness, FRP, confidence, satellite, acquisition time. Also supports area/country queries.

Free marine weather API aggregating Copernicus Marine Service data. Provides wave height, direction, period, swell/wind components, sea surface temperature, currents. Global coverage. No API key required. Hourly and daily forecasts. Good for coastal France monitoring.

Free air quality API based on CAMS European (11km, hourly) and global (45km, 3-hourly) forecasts. Returns European AQI, PM2.5, PM10, O3, NO2, SO2, CO, and more. 5-day forecast. No API key required. Also supports historical reanalysis data since 2013.

National ATMO air quality index by commune. WFS OGC service returning daily air quality scores per commune. Fields: code_qual (index 1-10), code_no2, code_o3, code_pm10, code_pm25, code_so2, lib_qual (label), source (local AASQA). Daily updates at ~14:00. ODbL license. Also available as CSV via data.gouv.fr. REST API at admindata.atmo-france.org (documented).

sources.authority: BRGM (Bureau de Recherches Géologiques et Minières) / Géorisques
sources.notes: Géorisques OpenData API for classified industrial/seveso installations (ICPE) across France. ~137k records with geolocation, activity, and hazard class. Add code_insee= to filter by commune, or bbox for spatial query. Confirmed 200 application/json.
